# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Discarded: this source should not enter the institute.

## Why

The captured source is a GitHub README describing an agent architecture, intended contributions, installation, and usage, but it does not present real experimental results, benchmark data, incident evidence, production telemetry, or field results. It is an architecture/project description rather than an evidence-bearing research artifact candidate.

## Limits
